steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content: From the table, the line passes through $(-18,-48)$ and $(7,52)$. The slope is $$m=(52-(-48))/(7-(-18))=100/25=4.$$

steps.title: Evaluate at the given x-value
steps.content: The point $(1/7,a)$ is on the line, so $$a=4(1/7)+24=4/7+168/7=172/7.$$ D is correct.
